title: EpiGePT: a pretrained transformer-based language model for context-specific human epigenomics.
author: Gao Z Liu Q Zeng W Jiang R Wong WH
content: S-EPMC11657395 PMC11657395 EpiGePT: a pretrained transformer-based language model for context-specific human epigenomics. The inherent similarities between natural language and biological sequences have inspired the use of large language models in genomics, but current models struggle
